гҖҖгҖҖDr. Dorothy Lewis is a psychiatrist whoвҖҷs spent her career examining serial killers. Through the use of chilling never-before-seen inmate interviews, Crazy, Not Insane explores the psychology of violence in an attempt to understand why people kill
